query: Could you please create a 5-day travel itinerary for one person, starting in Albuquerque and visiting 2 cities in Texas from March 25th to March 29th, 2022? The travel plan should work within a budget of $2,100.

plan.attraction: Space Center Houston; Downtown Aquarium; Water Wall; Houston Museum of Natural Science; Houston Zoo; The Museum of Fine Arts, Houston; Hermann Park; Houston Arboretum & Nature Center; Bayou Bend Collection and Gardens, Museum of Fine Arts, Houston; Market Square Park; Discovery Green; Smither Park; Children's Museum Houston; Holocaust Museum Houston; Sam Houston Park; Houston Legendary Graffiti Building; Beer Can House; American Statesmanship Park; Pioneer Memorial Obelisk;
